theme_and_archetype.aesthetic: Heavy Solo-Leveling RPG, Cyberpunk Fitness, System Window, Glowing Neon on Void Black

layout_and_spacing.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative overflow-hidden bg-black text-gray-100
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous vertical spacing between sections (gap-6, gap-8). Keep stats widgets dense (gap-2, p-3).
layout_and_spacing.borders: Corners should be sharp (rounded-none) or subtly angled. Use 1px borders with border-cyan-900/50.

cards.base_classes: bg-[#050505] border border-cyan-900/30 p-4 relative overflow-hidden
cards.corner_accents: Add tiny absolute positioned divs at corners (w-2 h-2 border-t border-l border-cyan-500 top-0 left-0) for tech look.

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-950/40 text-cyan-400 border border-cyan-500/50 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest py-3 px-6 hover:bg-cyan-900/60 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,255,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.danger: bg-red-950/40 text-red-500 border border-red-500/50 uppercase font-bold tracking-widest py-3 px-6 hover:bg-red-900/60 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,0,0,0.3)] transition-all

typography_badges.rank_badge: inline-block px-3 py-1 font-black text-2xl border border-current shadow-[0_0_10px_currentColor] bg-black

motion.system_alert: Slide up from bottom with typewriter effect for text.
motion.level_up: Screen flash (opacity 0 to 1 back to 0), scale up badge with spring physics.

system_bg.description: Abstract dark background with glowing cyan grid lines for the app backdrop
system_bg.usage: Use as a fixed background image with opacity-30 or opacity-20 behind the main container to give the 'System Window' vibe.

rank_badge_s.description: S Rank hunter badge, glowing neon blue hexagonal emblem
rank_badge_s.usage: Use in the Boss Fight test day screen or ultimate achievement screen.

rank_badge_e.description: E Rank hunter badge, rusty iron with faint blue glow
rank_badge_e.usage: Use on the dashboard as the starting rank.

boss_fight_portal.description: Epic boss fight glowing blue portal
boss_fight_portal.usage: Hero image for the 12-week max testing (Boss Fight) screen.

hologram_ai_coach.description: Futuristic AI coach avatar, glowing blue holographic
hologram_ai_coach.usage: Avatar image for the AI Coach suggestions modal/screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the app as a mobile web app interface using a 'max-w-md mx-auto' container to simulate the mobile app feel in a browser environment.
Ensure all interactive elements have descriptive 'data-testid' attributes in kebab-case based on role.
Never use generic sans-serif fonts (like Inter or Roboto). Use 'Rajdhani', 'Orbitron', or similar display fonts for headings and 'JetBrains Mono' for body/stats text.
Implement the 'System' alert popups using customized UI Dialogs/Toasts with sharp borders, glowing box shadows, and deep black backgrounds.
Do not use Shadcn default roundings. Override all borders to be sharp (rounded-none) and backgrounds to match the void black theme.
Use framer-motion for level up animations, slide-in system notifications, and subtle floating effects on the rank badges.
Replace typical solid background overlays with backdrop-blur and 1px borders for a holographic feel.
For the 'Today's Quest' cards, implement an angled top-left corner effect or glowing cyan border.
